AlberdiLab | Aizpurua et al. 2026

Chapter 7 Lower virulence and antimicrobial resistance of Qimmit microbiomes

load("resources/data.Rdata")
load("output/alpha_all.Rdata")

type_colors <- c('#41B6C0','#E5D388',"#bb6749")
new_labels <- c(
    "companion" = "Companion dogs",
    "sled_dog" = "Sled dogs",
    "wolf" = "Wolves"
    )

management_colors <- c('#41B6C0','#E5D388',"#f5c564","#bb6749")
management_labels <- c(
    "companion" = "Companion dogs",
    "civilian" = "Civilian dogs",
    "military" = "Sirius dogs",
    "wolf" = "Wolves"
    )

locality_colors <- c("#f5c564","#c49c4b","#9c7c3b", "#614e27")
locality_labels <- c(
    "Daneborg" = "Sirius dogs",
    "Disko" = "Disko Island",
    "Illulissat" = "Illulissat",
    "Ittoqqortoormiit" = "Ittoqqortoormiit"
    )

remove_sled <- read_csv("resources/sample_metadata.csv") %>% 
  filter(season=="winter")

sample_metadata <- sample_metadata %>%
  filter(!sample %in% remove_sled$sample) %>%
  mutate(
    dog_group = case_when(
      dog_type == "wolf" ~ "wolf",
      locality == "Disko" ~ "civilian",
      locality == "Daneborg" ~ "military",
      locality == "Illulissat" ~ "civilian",
      locality == "Ittoqqortoormiit" ~ "civilian",
      TRUE                   ~ "companion"
    )
  )
genome_annotations <- read_tsv("resources/gene_annotations.tsv.xz") %>%
  mutate(genome = str_extract(gene, "^[^^]+")) %>%
  mutate(ec = str_c("[EC:",ec,"]")) %>% 
  select(genome, everything())

7.1 Genome lenght

sample_genome_size <- genome_counts_filt %>% 
  mutate(across(-genome,~ .x / sum(.x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>% 
  inner_join(genome_metadata %>% select(genome,length), by = "genome") %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(genome, length),
    names_to  = "sample",
    values_to = "rel_abundance"
  ) %>%
  group_by(sample) %>%
  summarise(
    size = weighted.mean(length, w = rel_abundance, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  left_join(sample_metadata,by="sample")

Canids

sample_genome_size %>% 
  group_by(dog_type) %>%
  summarise(
    mean = mean(size, na.rm = T)/1000000,
    sd = sd(size, na.rm = T)/1000000) %>% 
  arrange(-mean) %>% 
  mutate(length=str_c(round(mean,3),"±",round(sd,3))) %>% 
  select(dog_type,length) 
# A tibble: 4 × 2
  dog_type  length     
  <chr>     <chr>      
1 companion 2.781±0.396
2 wolf      2.56±0.156 
3 sled_dog  2.475±0.233
4 <NA>      2.386±0.171
sample_genome_size %>%
  kruskal_test(size ~ dog_type) %>% 
  adjust_pvalue(method = "BH") %>%
  filter(p.adj < 0.05) %>% 
  tt()
.y. n statistic df p method p.adj
size 395 77.87757 2 1.23e-17 Kruskal-Wallis 1.23e-17 
sample_genome_size %>%
  wilcox_test(size ~ dog_type, p.adjust.method = "BH")%>% 
  filter(p.adj < 0.05)
# A tibble: 3 × 9
  .y.   group1    group2      n1    n2 statistic     p p.adj p.adj.signif
  <chr> <chr>     <chr>    <int> <int>     <dbl> <dbl> <dbl> <chr>       
1 size  companion sled_dog   190   130     19407 0     0     ****        
2 size  companion wolf       190    12      1615 0.016 0.024 *           
3 size  sled_dog  wolf       130    12       480 0.028 0.028 *           
sample_genome_size %>%
  wilcox_test(size ~ dog_type, p.adjust.method = "BH")%>% 
  filter(p.adj > 0.05)
# A tibble: 0 × 9
# ℹ 9 variables: .y. <chr>, group1 <chr>, group2 <chr>, n1 <int>, n2 <int>, statistic <dbl>, p <dbl>, p.adj <dbl>, p.adj.signif <chr>

Management: Civilian vs Military

sample_genome_size %>% 
  group_by(dog_group) %>%
  summarise(
    mean = mean(size, na.rm = T)/1000000,
    sd = sd(size, na.rm = T)/1000000) %>% 
  arrange(-mean) %>% 
  mutate(genome_size = str_c(round(mean, 3), " ± ", round(sd, 3))) %>%
  select(dog_group, genome_size) %>%
  rename(Group = 1, "Genome lenght" = 2)
# A tibble: 5 × 2
  Group     `Genome lenght`
  <chr>     <chr>          
1 companion 2.781 ± 0.396  
2 wolf      2.56 ± 0.156   
3 military  2.496 ± 0.104  
4 civilian  2.468 ± 0.259  
5 <NA>      2.386 ± 0.171  
sample_genome_size %>%
  kruskal_test(size ~ dog_group) %>%
  adjust_pvalue(method = "BH") %>%
  filter(p.adj < 0.05) %>%
  tt()
.y. n statistic df p method p.adj
size 395 79.04692 3 4.91e-17 Kruskal-Wallis 4.91e-17 
sample_genome_size %>%
  wilcox_test(size ~ dog_group, p.adjust.method = "BH") %>%
  filter(p.adj < 0.05)
# A tibble: 5 × 9
  .y.   group1    group2       n1    n2 statistic        p    p.adj p.adj.signif
  <chr> <chr>     <chr>     <int> <int>     <dbl>    <dbl>    <dbl> <chr>       
1 size  civilian  companion   101   190      4064 5.81e-16 3.49e-15 ****        
2 size  civilian  military    101    29      1035 1.6 e- 2 2.5 e- 2 *           
3 size  civilian  wolf        101    12       358 2.1 e- 2 2.5 e- 2 *           
4 size  companion military    190    29      4281 1.59e- 6 4.77e- 6 ****        
5 size  companion wolf        190    12      1615 1.6 e- 2 2.5 e- 2 *           
sample_genome_size %>%
  wilcox_test(size ~ dog_group, p.adjust.method = "BH") %>%
  filter(p.adj > 0.05)
# A tibble: 1 × 9
  .y.   group1   group2    n1    n2 statistic     p p.adj p.adj.signif
  <chr> <chr>    <chr>  <int> <int>     <dbl> <dbl> <dbl> <chr>       
1 size  military wolf      29    12       122 0.142 0.142 ns          
sample_genome_size %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = dog_type, y = size, color = dog_type, fill = dog_type)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.7, show.legend = FALSE, size = 0.5) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.5, alpha = 0.5, outlier.shape = NA, show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = type_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = type_colors) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = new_labels) +
  theme_classic()+
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 9, margin = margin(t = 0, r = 20, b = 0, l = 0)),
    axis.title.x = element_blank()
    )+
  labs(y="Genome length")

7.2 Antimicrobial resistance (AMR)

genome_amr <- genome_annotations %>% 
  group_by(genome) %>%
  summarise(AMR = sum(resistance_type == "AMR", na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
sample_amr <- genome_counts_filt %>%
  mutate(across(-genome, ~ .x / sum(.x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
  inner_join(genome_amr, by = "genome") %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -c(genome, AMR), names_to  = "sample", values_to = "rel_abundance") %>%
  group_by(sample) %>%
  summarise(AMR = weighted.mean(AMR, w = rel_abundance, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  left_join(sample_metadata, by = "sample")

MAG with highest values

genome_amr %>%
  left_join(genome_metadata, by = "genome") %>%
  arrange(-AMR)
# A tibble: 1,529 × 22
   genome       AMR domain phylum class order family genus species Completeness Contamination Completeness_Model_U…¹ Translation_Table_Used Coding_Density Contig_N50 Average_Gene_Length

7.2.1 Canids

sample_amr %>%
  group_by(dog_type) %>%
  summarise(mean = mean(AMR, na.rm = T), sd = sd(AMR, na.rm = T)) %>%
  arrange(-mean) %>%
  mutate(AMR = str_c(round(mean, 3), " ± ", round(sd, 3))) %>%
  select(dog_type, AMR) %>% 
  rename(Canid=1)
# A tibble: 4 × 2
  Canid     AMR             
  <chr>     <chr>           
1 companion 138.039 ± 27.318
2 sled_dog  117.797 ± 14.467
3 <NA>      110.602 ± 6.872 
4 wolf      106.715 ± 7.279 
sample_amr %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = dog_type, y = AMR, color = dog_type, fill = dog_type)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.7, show.legend = FALSE, size = 0.5) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.5, alpha = 0.5, outlier.shape = NA, show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = type_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = type_colors) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = new_labels)+
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 7), 
    strip.background = element_blank(), 
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 9, margin = margin(t = 0, r = 20, b = 0, l = 0)),
    axis.title.x = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(y = "AMR")

sample_amr %>%
  kruskal_test(AMR ~ dog_type) %>% 
  adjust_pvalue(method = "BH") %>%
  filter(p.adj < 0.05) %>% 
  tt()
.y. n statistic df p method p.adj
AMR 395 100.1936 2 1.75e-22 Kruskal-Wallis 1.75e-22 
sample_amr %>%
  wilcox_test(AMR ~ dog_type, p.adjust.method = "BH")%>% 
  filter(p.adj < 0.05)
# A tibble: 3 × 9
  .y.   group1    group2      n1    n2 statistic           p      p.adj p.adj.signif
  <chr> <chr>     <chr>    <int> <int>     <dbl>       <dbl>      <dbl> <chr>       
1 AMR   companion sled_dog   190   130     19700 0           0          ****        
2 AMR   companion wolf       190    12      2153 0.000000253 0.00000038 ****        
3 AMR   sled_dog  wolf       130    12      1302 0.000131    0.000131   ***

7.2.2 Management: Civilian & Military

sample_amr %>% 
  group_by(dog_group) %>%
  summarise(
    mean = mean(AMR, na.rm = T),
    sd = sd(AMR, na.rm = T)) %>% 
  arrange(-mean) %>% 
  mutate(AMR=str_c(round(mean,3)," ± ",round(sd,3))) %>% 
  select(dog_group, AMR) %>%
  rename(Group = 1, "Genome lenght" = 2)
# A tibble: 5 × 2
  Group     `Genome lenght` 
  <chr>     <chr>           
1 companion 138.039 ± 27.318
2 civilian  119.528 ± 15.441
3 military  111.768 ± 8.016 
4 <NA>      110.602 ± 6.872 
5 wolf      106.715 ± 7.279 
sample_amr %>% 
  filter(country=="Greenland") %>%
  wilcox_test(AMR ~ dog_group)
# A tibble: 1 × 7
  .y.   group1   group2      n1    n2 statistic         p
* <chr> <chr>    <chr>    <int> <int>     <dbl>     <dbl>
1 AMR   civilian military   101    29      2218 0.0000254
sample_amr %>%
  kruskal_test(AMR ~ dog_group) %>% 
  adjust_pvalue(method = "BH") %>%
  filter(p.adj < 0.05) %>% 
  tt()
.y. n statistic df p method p.adj
AMR 395 108.8611 3 1.93e-23 Kruskal-Wallis 1.93e-23

Significant

sample_amr %>%
  wilcox_test(AMR ~ dog_group, p.adjust.method = "BH")%>% 
  filter(p.adj < 0.05)
# A tibble: 6 × 9
  .y.   group1    group2       n1    n2 statistic        p    p.adj p.adj.signif
  <chr> <chr>     <chr>     <int> <int>     <dbl>    <dbl>    <dbl> <chr>       
1 AMR   civilian  companion   101   190      4463 5.94e-14 3.56e-13 ****        
2 AMR   civilian  military    101    29      2218 2.54e- 5 3.81e- 5 ****        
3 AMR   civilian  wolf        101    12      1021 1.12e- 4 1.34e- 4 ***         
4 AMR   companion military    190    29      4973 3.02e-12 9.06e-12 ****        
5 AMR   companion wolf        190    12      2153 2.53e- 7 5.06e- 7 ****        
6 AMR   military  wolf         29    12       281 2   e- 3 2   e- 3 **

Non-sig

sample_amr %>%
  wilcox_test(AMR ~ dog_group, p.adjust.method = "BH")%>% 
  filter(p.adj > 0.05)
# A tibble: 0 × 9
# ℹ 9 variables: .y. <chr>, group1 <chr>, group2 <chr>, n1 <int>, n2 <int>, statistic <dbl>, p <dbl>, p.adj <dbl>, p.adj.signif <chr>
sample_amr %>% 
  mutate(dog_group=factor(dog_group,levels=c("companion","civilian","military", "wolf"))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=dog_group, y=AMR, color=dog_group, fill=dog_group)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha=0.7, show.legend = FALSE, size=0.5) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.5, alpha=0.5,outlier.shape = NA, show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = management_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = management_colors) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = management_labels) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 9, margin = margin(t = 0, r = 20, b = 0, l = 0)),
    axis.title.x = element_blank()
    )+
  labs(y="AMR")

sample_amr %>% 
  filter(dog_type=="sled_dog") %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x=locality,y=AMR,color=locality,fill=locality)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha=0.7, show.legend = FALSE, size=0.5) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.5, alpha=0.5,outlier.shape = NA, show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = locality_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = locality_colors) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = locality_labels) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 9, margin = margin(t = 0, r = 20, b = 0, l = 0)),
    axis.title.x = element_blank()
    )+
  labs(y="AMR")

sample_amr %>%
  filter(dog_type=="sled_dog") %>% 
  kruskal_test(AMR ~ locality) %>% 
  adjust_pvalue(method = "BH") %>%
  filter(p.adj < 0.05) %>% 
  tt()
.y. n statistic df p method p.adj
AMR 130 24.43744 3 2.02e-05 Kruskal-Wallis 2.02e-05

Significant

sample_amr %>%
  filter(dog_type=="sled_dog") %>% 
  wilcox_test(AMR ~ locality, p.adjust.method = "BH")%>% 
  filter(p.adj < 0.05)
# A tibble: 2 × 9
  .y.   group1   group2        n1    n2 statistic           p      p.adj p.adj.signif
  <chr> <chr>    <chr>      <int> <int>     <dbl>       <dbl>      <dbl> <chr>       
1 AMR   Daneborg Disko         29    49       226 0.000000115 0.00000069 ****        
2 AMR   Daneborg Illulissat    29    23       197 0.011       0.034      *

Non-sig

sample_amr %>%
      filter(dog_type=="sled_dog") %>% 
  wilcox_test(AMR ~ locality, p.adjust.method = "BH")%>% 
  filter(p.adj > 0.05)
# A tibble: 4 × 9
  .y.   group1     group2              n1    n2 statistic     p p.adj p.adj.signif
  <chr> <chr>      <chr>            <int> <int>     <dbl> <dbl> <dbl> <chr>       
1 AMR   Daneborg   Ittoqqortoormiit    29    29       288 0.039 0.057 ns          
2 AMR   Disko      Illulissat          49    23       728 0.047 0.057 ns          
3 AMR   Disko      Ittoqqortoormiit    49    29       915 0.034 0.057 ns          
4 AMR   Illulissat Ittoqqortoormiit    23    29       341 0.898 0.898 ns

  filter(country=="Greenland") %>%

 8 EHI01295  113. Sled dog Military Greenland Daneborg sled_dog unknown unknown        unknown summer Military     military 
 9 EHI01294  112. Sled dog Military Greenland Daneborg sled_dog unknown unknown        unknown summer Military     military 
10 EHI01298  112. Sled dog Military Greenland Daneborg sled_dog unknown unknown        unknown summer Military     military 
# ℹ 19 more rows

7.3 Virulence factors

genome_vf <- genome_annotations %>% 
  group_by(genome) %>%
  summarise(vf = sum(!is.na(vf_type), na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

sample_vf <- genome_counts_filt %>% 
  mutate(across(-genome,~ .x / sum(.x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>% 
  inner_join(genome_vf, by = "genome") %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -c(genome, vf), names_to  = "sample", values_to = "rel_abundance") %>%
  group_by(sample) %>%
  summarise(
    vf = weighted.mean(vf, w = rel_abundance, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  left_join(sample_metadata, by="sample")

MAG with highest values

genome_vf %>% 
  left_join(genome_metadata, by="genome") %>% 
  arrange(-vf)

7.3.1 Canids

sample_vf %>% 
  group_by(dog_type) %>%
  summarise(
    mean = mean(vf, na.rm = T),
    sd = sd(vf, na.rm = T)) %>% 
  arrange(-mean) %>% 
  mutate(virulence=str_c(round(mean,3),"±",round(sd,3))) %>% 
  select(dog_type,virulence) 
# A tibble: 4 × 2
  dog_type  virulence    
  <chr>     <chr>        
1 companion 60.179±50.256
2 sled_dog  46.935±21.384
3 wolf      42.395±2.792 
4 <NA>      38.642±3.715 
sample_vf %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x=dog_type,y=vf,color=dog_type,fill=dog_type)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha=0.7, show.legend = FALSE, size=0.5) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.5, alpha=0.5,outlier.shape = NA, show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = type_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = type_colors) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = new_labels) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 9, margin = margin(t = 0, r = 20, b = 0, l = 0)),
    axis.title.x = element_blank()
    )+
  labs(y="Virulence factor")

sample_vf %>%
  kruskal_test(vf ~ dog_type) 
# A tibble: 1 × 6
  .y.       n statistic    df     p method        
* <chr> <int>     <dbl> <int> <dbl> <chr>         
1 vf      395      3.18     2 0.204 Kruskal-Wallis
sample_vf %>%
  wilcox_test(vf ~ dog_type, p.adjust.method = "BH")
# A tibble: 3 × 9
  .y.   group1    group2      n1    n2 statistic     p p.adj p.adj.signif
* <chr> <chr>     <chr>    <int> <int>     <dbl> <dbl> <dbl> <chr>       
1 vf    companion sled_dog   190   130     13758 0.083 0.25  ns          
2 vf    companion wolf       190    12      1226 0.663 0.663 ns          
3 vf    sled_dog  wolf       130    12       677 0.452 0.663 ns

7.3.2 Management: Civilian & Military

sample_vf %>% 
  filter(country=="Greenland") %>% 
  group_by(dog_group) %>%
  summarise(
    mean = mean(vf, na.rm = T),
    sd = sd(vf, na.rm = T)) %>% 
  arrange(-mean) %>% 
  mutate(virulence=str_c(round(mean,3),"±",round(sd,3))) %>% 
  select(dog_group,virulence) %>%
  rename("Sled dog" = 1, "Virulence factor" = 2)
# A tibble: 2 × 2
  `Sled dog` `Virulence factor`
  <chr>      <chr>             
1 civilian   47.903±23.862     
2 military   43.566±7.625      
sample_vf %>% 
  filter(country=="Greenland") %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x=dog_group,y=vf,color=dog_group,fill=dog_group)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha=0.5, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.5, alpha=0.3,outlier.shape = NA, show.legend = FALSE) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14, margin = margin(t = 0, r = 20, b = 0, l = 0)),
    axis.title.x = element_blank()
    )

sample_vf %>% 
  filter(country=="Greenland") %>%
  wilcox_test(vf ~ dog_group)
# A tibble: 1 × 7
  .y.   group1   group2      n1    n2 statistic     p
* <chr> <chr>    <chr>    <int> <int>     <dbl> <dbl>
1 vf    civilian military   101    29      1233 0.196
sample_vf %>%
    filter(country=="Greenland") %>%
  kruskal_test(vf ~ locality) %>% 
  adjust_pvalue(method = "BH") %>%
  filter(p.adj < 0.05) %>% 
  tt()
.y. n statistic df p method p.adj
vf 130 12.28868 3 0.00646 Kruskal-Wallis 0.00646

Significant

sample_vf %>%
  filter(country=="Greenland") %>%
  wilcox_test(vf ~ locality, p.adjust.method = "BH")%>% 
  filter(p.adj < 0.05)
# A tibble: 2 × 9
  .y.   group1     group2              n1    n2 statistic        p p.adj p.adj.signif
  <chr> <chr>      <chr>            <int> <int>     <dbl>    <dbl> <dbl> <chr>       
1 vf    Daneborg   Illulissat          29    23       521 0.000385 0.002 **          
2 vf    Illulissat Ittoqqortoormiit    23    29       157 0.000885 0.003 **

Non-sig

sample_vf %>%
  filter(country=="Greenland") %>%
  wilcox_test(vf ~ locality, p.adjust.method = "BH")%>% 
  filter(p.adj > 0.05)
# A tibble: 4 × 9
  .y.   group1   group2              n1    n2 statistic     p p.adj p.adj.signif

sample_vf %>% 
  filter(dog_type=="sled_dog") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=locality,y=vf,color=locality,fill=locality)) +

  geom_boxplot(width = 0.5, alpha=0.5,outlier.shape = NA, show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = locality_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = locality_colors) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = locality_labels) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 9, margin = margin(t = 0, r = 20, b = 0, l = 0)),
    axis.title.x = element_blank()
    )+

sample_vf %>% 
  filter(dog_type=="sled_dog") %>%
 # filter(!str_starts(sample, "GL_02")) %>% 
  mutate(Pack = as.factor(Pack)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=locality,y=vf,color=locality,fill=locality)) +
  geom_jitter(aes(shape = Pack),width = 0.2, alpha=0.7, show.legend = FALSE, size=0.5) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.5, alpha=0.5,outlier.shape = NA, show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = locality_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = locality_colors) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = locality_labels) +

    axis.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 9, margin = margin(t = 0, r = 20, b = 0, l = 0)),

7.4 Size-function correlations

sample_genome_size %>% 
  left_join(sample_amr %>% select(sample,AMR),by="sample") %>% 
  left_join(sample_vf %>% select(sample,vf),by="sample") %>% 
  left_join(alpha_div,by="sample") %>% 
  summarise(
    size_AMR = cor(size, AMR,  use = "complete.obs"),
    size_vf  = cor(size, vf,   use = "complete.obs"),
    size_richness  = cor(size, richness,   use = "complete.obs"),
    size_neutral  = cor(size, neutral,   use = "complete.obs"),
    size_phylogenetic  = cor(size, phylogenetic,   use = "complete.obs"),
    neutral_AMR = cor(neutral, AMR,   use = "complete.obs")
  )
# A tibble: 1 × 6
  size_AMR size_vf size_richness size_neutral size_phylogenetic neutral_AMR
     <dbl>   <dbl>         <dbl>        <dbl>             <dbl>       <dbl>
1    0.709   0.666        -0.470       -0.542            -0.456      -0.323
sample_genome_size %>%
  left_join(sample_amr %>% select(sample, AMR), by = "sample") %>%
  left_join(alpha_div, by = "sample") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = size, y = AMR, color = country)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, show.legend = FALSE) +
  theme_classic()

sample_genome_size %>%
  left_join(sample_amr %>% select(sample, AMR), by = "sample") %>%
  left_join(alpha_div, by = "sample") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = size, y = AMR, color = dog_type)) +
  geom_point() +
  scale_color_manual(values = type_colors, breaks = c("companion", "sled_dog", "wolf"),
      labels = c("Companion dogs", "Sled dogs", "Wolves")) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, show.legend = FALSE) +
  theme_classic()+
  labs(y="AMR", x="Genome size", color = "Canids")

sample_genome_size %>%
  left_join(sample_amr %>% select(sample, AMR), by = "sample") %>%
  left_join(alpha_div, by = "sample") %>% 
  ggplot(., aes(x = size, y = AMR)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  stat_cor(aes(label = paste(..rr.label.., ..p.label.., sep = "~`,`~"))) +
  theme_classic()+
  labs(y="AMR", x="Genome size")

df <- sample_genome_size %>% 
  left_join(sample_amr %>% select(sample, AMR), by = "sample") %>% 
  left_join(alpha_div, by = "sample")

cor.test(df$size, df$AMR, method = "spearman")

    Spearman's rank correlation rho

data:  df$size and df$AMR
S = 5536470, p-value < 2.2e-16
alternative hypothesis: true rho is not equal to 0
sample estimates:
      rho 
0.4609914 
model <- lm(AMR ~ size, data = df)
summary(model)

Call:
lm(formula = AMR ~ size, data = df)

Residuals:
    Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
-39.939 -11.423  -2.219  10.818  67.664 

Coefficients:
             Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
(Intercept) 1.122e+00  6.326e+00   0.177    0.859    
size        4.786e-05  2.401e-06  19.931   <2e-16 ***
---
Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1

Residual standard error: 16.96 on 393 degrees of freedom
Multiple R-squared:  0.5027,    Adjusted R-squared:  0.5014 
F-statistic: 397.3 on 1 and 393 DF,  p-value: < 2.2e-16

summary(model)

df%>%
  group_by(country) %>%
  do(tidy(lm(vf ~ size, data = .))) %>% 
  filter(term=="size")%>% 
  filter(p.value<0.05)

summary(model)

sample_genome_size %>%
  left_join(sample_vf %>% select(sample, vf), by = "sample") %>%
  left_join(alpha_div, by = "sample") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = size, y = vf, color = country)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, show.legend = FALSE) +
  theme_classic()

sample_genome_size %>%
  left_join(sample_vf %>% select(sample, vf), by = "sample") %>%
  left_join(alpha_div, by = "sample") %>% 
  ggplot(., aes(x = size, y = vf)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  stat_cor(aes(label = paste(..rr.label.., ..p.label.., sep = "~`,`~"))) +
  theme_classic()

AMR and VF correlation colored by genome size

sample_amr %>%
  left_join(sample_vf %>% select(sample, vf), by = "sample") %>%
  left_join(sample_genome_size %>% select(sample, size), by = "sample") %>% 
  ggplot(., aes(x = AMR, y = vf,color = size)) +
  geom_point(size=3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
    scale_color_viridis_c() +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(2, 7)) +
  stat_cor(aes(label = paste(..rr.label.., ..p.label.., sep = "~`,`~")), size = 6, show.legend = FALSE) +
  theme_classic()+
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(
      size = 0.5,
      linetype = "solid",
      colour = "black"
    ),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.box = "vertical"
  )+
  labs(color="Genome size")
